penalties.description: Video appears to be instructional content rather than a scoreable task performance attempt

score_components.formula_applied: automatic zero due to auto-fail penalty

reasoning: Major disagreement between models on whether this is a scoreable performance attempt. Claude identified this as instructional content with promotional overlays and no clear timing markers. GPT-4o scored it as a completed task in 175 seconds. Given the fundamental disagreement about video content type and the lack of clear task attempt boundaries, the conservative approach is to treat this as non-scoreable instructional content per Claude's assessment.
